name: rung_449_frontier_multibind_uncle_query
utterances: assert rule uncle(U, N) :- sibling(U, P), parent(P, N).

utterances.utterance: blake has will and pierce and his bro scott is their uncle yeah
clarification_answers: His bro means Scott is sibling of Blake.
Set sibling(scott, blake). Set parent(blake, will). Set parent(blake, pierce).
